response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple domains, including embedded systems (Dlang, C/C++) and networking, with a strong background in security-related projects. However, his resume lacks explicit mention of Linux kernel modification, MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, or embedded networking for LAN switches, which are critical for this role. His Japanese language proficiency is also not evident, and his recent roles focus heavily on web/mobile development rather than embedded security firmware.
strengths: Strong C/C++ and embedded system experience (Dlang, LabWindows/CVI)
Proven ability to work with networking technologies (HTTP, microservices, high-performance systems)
Demonstrated problem-solving and architecture design skills across diverse projects
concerns: No clear evidence of Linux kernel modification or source-code level security work
Lacks explicit experience with required security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption key exchange)
Japanese language proficiency and embedded networking for LAN switches not demonstrated
